headline: How The Equifax (EFX) Investment Narrative Is Shifting On Pricing, AI And Regulatory Concerns
summary: Equifax is back in focus as its fair value estimate is trimmed to US$237.35 from US$237.60, a very small shift that still matters for investors tracking valuation signals. That adjustment comes as analysts split on whether recent headlines around pricing, regulation and competition justify more cautious price targets or are mostly short term noise. In the sections ahead, you will see how these updated assumptions fit into the broader bullish and bearish narrative, as well as what to watch as...
